title: Add phx-hook for a client-side behavior
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/chart_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ChartLive). Render a <div id="chart" phx-hook="Chart" data-values={Jason.encode!(@values)}> that binds a JS hook named "Chart". mount/3 assigns :values as [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. The key output is the phx-hook attribute and the data-* attribute.
tier_rationale: phx-hook is a specific attribute with required id.
